name: FacetsGrpIDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH CTE AS (SELECT GRGR_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_FacetsOwner}.CMC_GRGR_GROUP WHERE CICI_ID = 'MA' AND GRGR_TERM_DT = '2024-12-31') SELECT GRGR_ID FROM CTE

Description:
Job Name :  FacetsGrpIDExtr
Calling Job:  EAMFctsReconRptCntl

Description: This job is to pull the GRGR_ID's from CMC_GRGR_GROUP table in facets.
